arguments.name: COMPARESOURCE
arguments.description:
Specifies a folder to compare source and generate a diff model
This can be useful for finding API changes or compare branches

arguments.name: COMPAREASSEMBLIES
arguments.description:
Specifies a set of assemblies to include to generate a adiff model.
Separate with ; for multiple assemblies

arguments.name: PREPROCESSORS
arguments.description: Define a set of preprocessors values. Use ; to separate multiple

arguments.name: EXCLUDE
arguments.description:
Defines one or more strings that can't be part of the path Ie '/Samples/;/UnitTests/'
(use forward slash for folder separators)

arguments.name: REGEXFILTER
arguments.description: Defines a regular expression for filtering on full file names in the source

arguments.name: REFERENCEASSEMBLIES
arguments.description: Specifies a set of assemblies to include for references for better type resolution.

arguments.name: FILTER
arguments.description:
A set of namespaces or classes to ignore. For example: -filter=Microsoft.CSharp;Microsoft.VisualBasic
Using Nuget comparison:  nuget                nuget packages to generate OMD for (separate multiple with semicolon). Example: /nuget=Newtonsoft.Json:13.0.0

arguments.name: COMPARENUGET
arguments.description: nuget packages to compare versions with (separate multiple with semicolon). Example: /nuget=Newtonsoft.Json:12.0.0

arguments.name: TFM
arguments.description: Target Framework to use against NuGet package. Example: /tfm=net8.0-windows10.0.19041.0
